title: plantago sericea subsp. sericans
intro: Plantago sericea subsp. sericans, also known as silky plantain, is a subspecies of the plantain family that is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of silky plantain include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and aid in the healing of digestive issues. Silky plantain can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and reduce the symptoms of various health conditions.
